name: indent_center

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Combined 字下げ＋ページの左右中央: an indented block that is also page-centred. It is the indent family carrying a center flag, so it closes with the shared 字下げ終わり (pairing is by family); the opener preserves both the amount and the center flag on round-trip.

source:
［＃ここから5字下げ、ページの左右中央に］
献辞
［＃ここで字下げ終わり］

expected.html: 献辞
